title: Former Secretary of Defense Mattis Visits Belfer Center
summary: The Belfer Center was honored to host former Secretary of Defense James Mattis this fall for an afternoon of conversations related to applied history and statesmanship.
body: The Belfer Center was honored to host former Secretary of Defense James Mattis this fall for an afternoon of conversations related to applied history and statesmanship. Mattis, a four-star General and former CENTCOM commander who served as President Trump’s first Secretary of Defense, spoke with Harvard Kennedy School faculty, fellows, and students about the right—and wrong—ways to apply analogs and precedents to illuminate policy choices. Mattis is known for his voluminous personal collection of works on statecraft, war, and diplomacy, and he drew frequently on such scholarship in his government service. Mattis recently published a memoir covering his decades of public service, Call Sign Chaos: Learning to Lead. Former Belfer Center Director Graham Allison , who is building an Applied History program at Harvard Kennedy School, moderated events during Mattis’s visit. Learn more about the Applied History Project at belfercenter.org/AppliedHistory. The latest from Belfer See more Recommended citation "Former Secretary of Defense Mattis Visits Belfer Center." Belfer Center Newsletter, Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School. (Fall/Winter 2019-2020). result.main_content_en: In the fall, the Belfer Center hosted former Secretary of Defense James Mattis for discussions on applied history and statesmanship. The former four-star General and CENTCOM commander, known for his extensive personal library on statecraft and his recent memoir 'Call Sign Chaos: Learning to Lead,' engaged with Harvard Kennedy School faculty, fellows, and students. The conversation focused on the correct and incorrect methods of applying historical analogs and precedents to inform contemporary policy decisions. Graham Allison, the former Belfer Center Director who is developing an Applied History program at HKS, moderated the events during Mattis's visit. The session underscored the practical use of historical scholarship in governance and leadership.
result.main_content_zh: 今年秋天，贝尔弗中心荣幸地接待了前国防部长詹姆斯·马蒂斯，就应用历史与治国方略进行了为期半天的对话。这位四星上将、前美国中央司令部司令，以其关于治国之道、战争与外交的大量个人藏书以及近期出版的回忆录《呼号混乱：学习领导》而闻名。他与哈佛大学肯尼迪学院的教职员工、研究员及学生进行了交流，重点探讨了如何正确及错误地运用历史类比和先例来阐明政策选择。正在哈佛肯尼迪学院筹建应用历史项目的前贝尔弗中心主任格雷厄姆·艾利森主持了马蒂斯访问期间的活动。此次活动强调了历史学术研究在政府服务和领导力实践中的实际应用价值。
